raw_content: f/prompts.chat: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy. (stars: 162,743 | lang: HTML | topics: ai, artificial-intelligence, awesome-list, chatgpt, chatgpt-prompts, claude, gemini, gpt, gpt-4, llm, machine-learning, nextjs, open-source, openai, prompt-engineering, prompts, prompts-chat, typescript)

analysis.impact: 作为最大的开源提示词社区之一，它显著降低了LLM使用门槛，推动了提示工程知识的民主化传播。
